description:
Add a scheduled reconciliation job for MDI case status drift.

**Scope**
- EventBridge schedule invokes a bounded Lambda that checks recent active cases against MDI.
- Correct stale local status mirrors and write minimal evidence events.
- Alarm on repeated errors or unexpected drift spikes.
- Keep the job bounded for launch scale; no always-on worker service.

**Acceptance**
- Artificially stale status is corrected on the next run.
- Reconciler handles MDI unavailable/418 without deleting or corrupting local status.
- Drift alarms route to the launch ops channel/runbook.
title: MDI case-status reconciliation Lambda
